item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was just a fun read, had me giggling from the first line.

+1. SCP-049-J being the murderer got a burst of laughter from me so you pretty much deserve it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Maravilla stood up. "Alright, now that's just insulting. That presentation was one of the best of the day! Our clinical tone was perfect! Our conclusions fascinating!"

Curie looked down at the table. "I dunno, it could have used more narrative."

meta is fun.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ironic.

He could cure others from death. But not himself…

Absolutely hilarious
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It was a dark and stormy night.

last edited: 17 Feb 2018, 21:10 (9 days ago)

I'm calling the police.

In all seriousness, this was great. Had me chuckling all the way though.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Alright. I got a kick out of 049-J murdering 049, all while doing it in the disguise of someone named Agent Curie. On top of that, the dialogue, and jabs at clinical tone and narrative got more than a few chuckles from me.

+1. Just because the theme is Murder Mystery does not mean it needs to be a serious murder mystery.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Really appreciating the effort you're putting into making all these reviews, you're a saint :D

Honestly - at this point I consider "049-hating" more of a community meme than anything serious. The line between stupid-funny and stupid-stupid is a delicate tightrope and I think I just sprinted across with my eyes closed when I wrote this.

Your feedback on prose and structuring is valuable and helpful; I didn't have time to consult your tale guide :P But the proposed changes definitely look good and I will most likely implement them after the contest.

Thanks for reading!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I upvoted. Typically, this sort of thing wouldn't work for me; silly joke tales aren't my deal and I'm not really into the whole 'dogpile on 049' thing. But I don't know — it's like how sometimes a pun can just be so dumb it just does work.

I don't have much to offer in the ways of feedback here; the story's short, and while the prose could certainly be cleaner in a couple of spots, it gets you where you need to go.

FEEDBACK
– hide block

Acosta could feel individual hairs turning grayer by the second. "Alright, nobody move, NOBODY MOVE! There. Alright, so here's the situation at present. SCP-049 was found dead in its cell 20 minutes ago." A cacophony of cheers, sighs, laughter, and yelling erupted from the gathered scientists. "Quiet! This means, first and foremost, that the Site is on lockdown until we get this sorted out. And you're all suspects. Mobile Task Forces are sweeping the building. I've got Internal Affairs investigators on every line. We are going to get to the bottom of this, and figure out who gets the dubious honor of a posthumous celebration. Agent Curie will be leading this investigation."

I think this paragraph would work better broken up a bit for dramatic emphasis:

Acosta could feel individual hairs turning grayer by the second. "Alright, nobody move, NOBODY MOVE! There. Alright, so here's the situation at present. SCP-049 was found dead in its cell 20 minutes ago."

A cacophony of cheers, sighs, laughter, and yelling erupted from the gathered scientists.

"Quiet! This means, first and foremost, that the Site is on lockdown until we get this sorted out. And you're all suspects. Mobile Task Forces are sweeping the building. I've got Internal Affairs investigators on every line. We are going to get to the bottom of this, and figure out who gets the dubious honor of a posthumous celebration. Agent Curie will be leading this investigation."

Glad it's gone," he said pointing at the pile.

Curie looked down at the table. "I dunno, it could have used more narrative."

you sonofabitch

Anyway, good luck with the contest!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
That was really silly and you pulled it off really well.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Honestly, same. I'm a novote mainly because although I found the Darth Plagueis joke hilarious and loved the final twist, it's a bit too silly for my taste.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's a tricky line to walk and everyone's is different. Thanks for reading, in any case.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I know I’m supposed to hate when internet memes are injected into wiki articles, but the tragedy of Darth Plagueis the Wise is too funny not to appreciate.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Yes, hmm. I will be personally conducting all interviews. I assure you, my team and I are most experienced at handling situations like these."

Totally not SCP-049 in disguise.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is just silly. Now, normally I'm a big fan of silly, but something about this just didn't come together for me. +-0

item.title: let's jelly and jam
item.content:encoded:
JamCon2018 entry. Got the idea on the drive home and stayed up until 2 am to finish it. What the hell.

Thanks to XilasCrowe for making this technically not a coldpost.
